narrative:
Walnut Twp township has 4,640 registered voters, with 50.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.0 percentage points.
